description: Style NoteThis funky adidas tracksuit is ideal for all your training needs. The sleek blue track jacket complements the track pants and the patented 3-Stripes gives it an added edge. The soft and broad elastic waistband sits snugly, while the drawstrings allow you to further customize the Fit. Pair it with Sports t-shirts and performance shoes for an extended training sessionProduct DetailsWhite and blue track jacket that has mock collar, full front zipped closure, elasticated hem and cuffs, long sleeves, blue panels on the front and back, adidas patented 3-Stripes from the shoulders till the cuffs, two zippered pockets on the sides and printed brand name and logo on the left shoulderNavy blue track pant that has an elasticated waistband with a drawstring on the inside, adidas patented 3-Stripe panels on the sides, zipped closures at the hem, two zipped side pockets, mesh lining, elasticated hems and printed branding at the backMaterial and Care100% polyesterNormal wash cold inside out at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron do not iron on decorationSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height:6' and waist:32") is wearing a size M
